scripts.deploy: echo 'Error: Please use deploy:staging or deploy:production' && exit 1
scripts.db:migrate: echo 'For local development, use db:setup instead. For remote databases, use db:migrate:staging or db:migrate:production' && exit 1
scripts.db:migrate:staging: wrangler d1 migrations apply signup-db-staging --env staging --remote --config wrangler.jsonc
scripts.db:migrate:production: wrangler d1 migrations apply signup-db-production --env production --remote --config wrangler.jsonc
scripts.dev:setup: pnpm run db:setup && pnpm run dev
